content.en:
Truncate Montenegro.

Ye Tian's copy body came out directly from the Truncated Yellow Building, and went deep into the Truncated Black Mountain along the Truncated Black Mountain.

At this moment, he did not carefully dodge the powerful primordial artifact as he had in the past.

Cutting off the most powerful primordial antiquities in the general place of Black Mountain is only the sevenfold primordial ancestor realm, and there are not even half-step eightfold primordial artifacts at the level of primordial antiquities.

Therefore, as long as Ye Tian does not go deep into the depths of the Black Mountain, he will not encounter any great danger.

Along.

Ye Tian didn't encounter the slightest trouble, even if some primordial artifacts occasionally attacked him, they were all killed by him casually.

It didn't take long for Ye Tian to finally come to the treasure land that the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor said.

This place is located in the depths of the Truncated Black Mountain, but it is still far from the place where the Ninefold Origin Ancestral Capital fell.

......

The dense red stones froze in this space-time, and the countless red stones emitted red light that dyed this area red.

And in the middle of these countless red stones stood a red peak, and around the red peaks stood dozens of Dao Ancestors.

These Dao Ancestors are basically at the peak of the Eightfold Origin Ancestors, and they are all cultivating here at the moment.

At this time, Ye Tian entered this area.

"According to what the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor said, this red mountain peak can allow the Dao Ancestors to comprehend the immeasurable Dao Prototype! However, the Dao Ancestors can't enter this mountain, they can only practice around the peak!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Abrupt.

Some red primordial artifacts appeared inside a red stone around him, attacking Ye Tian.

Ye Tian casually blew up these primordial antiquities, but after these primordial antiquities were killed, the energy was absorbed by this side of time and space.

These primordial artifacts are not strong, and the strongest is comparable to the half-step Eightfold Primordial Ancestor, but when they attack, they must also kill them, otherwise they will not be able to comprehend with peace of mind.

Moreover, these primordial artifacts are born very frequently, and a batch of primordial artifacts will attack every once in a while.

"These primordial artifacts are killed, the energy is absorbed by this space-time, and then new primordial artifacts are born, and they can never be killed. Therefore, there must be a guardian who is responsible for cleaning up these primordial antiquities before they can participate in enlightenment and practice with peace of mind!"

So, Ye Tian left for a while, copied a body, and then came here.

In this way, he has two bodies, one that practices here and one that cleans up the original antiquities.

When the other Yae Ancestors saw his two bodies, they would only think that they were one doppelganger.

Although the doppelgangers of the Yae Origin Ancestor are rare, some Dao Ancestors still have them, so it is not surprising.

Next, Ye Tian found a place around the red mountain peak and began to comprehend the prototype of the Infinite Dao.

Airplanes!!!

Under this strange force field, Ye Tian found that his understanding and perception of the rudimentary form of the Infinite Dao had improved a lot.

Cultivating in such a treasure land is much faster than practicing on your own!

"What a powerful effect!"

Ye Tian said excitedly.

However, it is such a good effect, but the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor said that this place is average, and it is of some use to the Dao Ancestor who has just comprehended the rudiments of the Immeasurable Dao, but it is useless to a Dao Ancestor like the Absolute Sword Dao Ancestor.

"It is estimated that I have realized the rudiments of the Immeasurable Path very quickly, so the effect here will be better for me. And the other people's comprehension of the Infinite Dao prototype is almost stagnant, even with the help here, the effect is still not obvious, so I don't think it's of much use here!"

Ye Tian didn't think too much, he felt that this place helped him a lot, and he could practice here for the time being.

In the silent Black Sea, the rudiments of the Immeasurable Path are divided into Entry, Small Achievement, Great Completion, and Peak, until the Infinite Path is truly comprehended.

Ye Tian's goal this time is not high, it is enough to raise the prototype of the Infinite Dao to the realm of Xiaocheng.

As the long years passed, Ye Tian continued to comprehend the Infinite Dao Prototype here, his understanding of the Infinite Dao Prototype became deeper and deeper, and the Infinite Dao Prototype Aura on his body became stronger and stronger.

At this time, the other powerhouses at the peak of the Eightfold Origin Ancestor noticed Ye Tian's progress, and they were all shocked.

Some Dao Ancestors even secretly investigated Ye Tian's identity, and this investigation was immediately shocked.

In their opinion, Ye Tian's experience was too amazing, and the speed of growth was comparable to that of the First Dao Ancestor of the Silent Black Sea today, which was comparable to those reincarnated top Eightfold Origin Ancestors!

But all kinds of signs showed that Ye Tian was unlikely to be the reincarnated top eightfold ancestor.

Then there is only one biggest possibility, Ye Tiannai is an incomparably demonic peerless genius, and it is difficult to give birth to one for hundreds of millions of years!

......

Ten Mountains.

At this time, the two Ninefold Origin Ancestors were discussing Ye Tian.

One is the Voidless Dao Ancestor in the late stage of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor, and the other is the Haoyang Dao Ancestor at the peak realm of the Ninefold Origin Ancestor.

"Nothing, the Nine-Fold Building gave birth to a very demonic genius, and he cultivated to the Eightfold Origin Ancestor Realm in a very short period of time, and he suspected that he raised his life level to 9.9 when he was in the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor Realm, and I received some information from him before, but I didn't care much about it. Now, he has become an Eightfold Primordial Ancestor, and he has comprehended the Infinite Dao Prototype!" Haoyang Dao Ancestor said.

"Are you sure the other party has raised their life level to 9.9?"

The Void Dao Ancestor said solemnly.

"It's very likely, after all, this genius raised his life level to 9.8 in a short period of time, and then entered the Ninefold Realm of the Nine-Fold Building, but it didn't take long for him to come out, and then he succeeded in attacking the Sevenfold Ancestor. Normally, the cultivation time was so short, if he hadn't raised his life level to 9.9, he wouldn't have chosen to break through so quickly! Everyone knew that the 9.8 and 9.9 life levels of the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor Realm seemed to be only a little bit, but the gap in the future was very large. Then the biggest possibility is that he has already reached the 9.9 life level! It's a pity that such a genius, Jiu Chong Lou must have blocked the deduction early, and we can't deduce whether he was raised to the 9.9 life level at that time, we can only rely on guessing!"

Wuxu Dao Ancestor asked: "Do you want to kill the other party?" But such a genius, his body must be in the Nine Floors, and even give a life-saving thing, it's not easy to kill!"

Haoyang Dao Ancestor said: "Cutting off the Black Mountain, two Endless Dao Ancestors have been discovered, which are very likely to be the ontology or doppelganger of this genius. This is the perfect opportunity to kill him!"

"What if both are clones?"

Wuxu Dao Ancestor said.

"That's okay, just give it a try. Let a half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor make a move, and after killing the other party, flee immediately!" Haoyang Dao Ancestor proposed.

"Who will go?"

Wuxu Dao Ancestor asked.

Haoyang Daozu pondered for a while, and finally made a decision.

"Let the Lonely Dao Ancestor go, his escape ability can be called the top ten of the half-step Ninefold Origin Ancestor, and his life-saving ability is very strong, even if he encounters an ordinary Ninefold Ancestor, there is hope to escape!" Haoyang Dao Ancestor said.

Wuxu Dao Ancestor nodded and agreed to Haoyang Dao Ancestor's proposal.
